MRG Metals Limited ( (AU:MRQ) ) has shared an update.

MRG Metals Limited has requested a trading halt on its securities as it prepares to release a significant announcement concerning the approval of mining licenses. This move indicates potential strategic developments that could impact the company’s market position and stakeholder interests, pending further information.

MRG Metals Limited operates within the mining industry, focusing on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily engaged in securing mining licenses to further its operations.

data.title: WAM Global Limited Reports Positive December Performance Driven by Key Investments
data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

WAM Global Ltd. ( (AU:WGB) ) has issued an update.

WAM Global Limited’s investment portfolio showed positive performance in December, primarily driven by the success of SAP SE and MSCI Inc. SAP’s strong cloud segment growth and successful transition to cloud-based solutions have positioned it well to meet future targets, while MSCI’s solid revenue growth and strategic wins in the investment sector indicate its resilience and potential for long-term shareholder value. The company reported a fully franked full-year dividend of 12.0 cents per share, demonstrating a commitment to providing returns to shareholders.

More about WAM Global Ltd.

WAM Global Limited is an investment company that focuses on undervalued growth opportunities. It operates in the financial industry, providing investment management services with an emphasis on global markets.

data.title: Chordia Therapeutics Secures Orphan Drug Designation for Rogocekib in the U.S.
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Chordia Therapeutics Inc. ( (JP:190A) ) has provided an update.

Chordia Therapeutics announced that rogocekib, its CLK inhibitor for the treatment of Refractory or Relapsed Acute Myologic Lymphoma (AML), has been granted Orphan Drug Designation by the FDA in the United States. This designation provides various developmental and financial benefits, including application fee exemptions, tax reductions, and exclusive market rights for seven years post-approval, paving the way for the potential commercialization of rogocekib.

More about Chordia Therapeutics Inc.

Chordia Therapeutics Inc. is a clinical-stage biotech company based in Fujisawa, Kanagawa Prefecture, Japan, focused on the research and development of novel cancer therapies. Its lead asset, rogocekib, is a CLK inhibitor currently undergoing Phase 1/2 clinical trials in the U.S. The company is also working on other preclinical assets, such as CTX-439, a CDK12 inhibitor, and GCN2 inhibitors.

YTD Price Performance: -1.58%

Average Trading Volume: 7,098,076

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

See more insights into 190A stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Incitec Pivot Limited ( (AU:IPL) ) has shared an announcement.

Incitec Pivot Limited announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back of its ordinary fully paid shares with the ASX security code IPL. As part of this buy-back program, the company repurchased a total of 291,170 securities on the previous day, adding to the 75,436,356 securities bought back before the previous day. data.title: Hydreight Technologies Reflects on 2024 Successes and 2025 Vision
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Hydreight Technologies Inc ( (TSE:NURS) ) just unveiled an update.

Hydreight Technologies Inc. announced significant milestones achieved in 2024, including the successful launch of VSDHOne, a telemedicine and e-commerce platform that has sold over 200 licenses across all 50 states. This development, along with a 54% increase in Q3 revenue and achieving positive adjusted EBITDA, has strengthened their market position. As they enter 2025, Hydreight aims to leverage VSDHOne to drive growth, positioning themselves as a key player in healthcare innovation by providing scalable and compliant solutions for digital health providers.

More about Hydreight Technologies Inc

Hydreight Technologies Inc. is a rapidly growing mobile clinical network and medical platform provider. The company focuses on innovative telehealth solutions, enabling healthcare businesses to scale efficiently across the United States. Its offerings are designed to provide comprehensive solutions for launching and expanding healthcare brands while navigating regulatory challenges.

data.title: Charter Hall Increases Stake in Hotel Property Investments
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Charter Hall Retail REIT ( (AU:CQR) ) has provided an update.

Charter Hall Retail REIT, through its Charter Hall Wholesale Management Limited, acts as a trustee for investment trusts and focuses on managing assets within the retail real estate sector. Recently, it has increased its stake in Hotel Property Investments (HPI), enhancing its voting power from 60.50% to 61.59% in the company. This change signifies a strategic move by Charter Hall to consolidate its holdings in HPI, potentially increasing its influence and control over HPI’s operations and strategic direction.

More about Charter Hall Retail REIT

Mader Group Ltd ( (AU:MAD) ) has provided an announcement.

The Capital Group Companies, Inc. (CGC) has become a substantial holder in Mader Group Ltd as of January 8, 2025, acquiring a 5% voting power through its investment management company, Capital Research and Management Company (CRMC). data.title: Desert Control AS Expands Share Capital to Bolster Sustainability Initiatives
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Desert Control AS ( (DE:8KT) ).

Desert Control AS has successfully registered the issuance of 120,000 new shares, increasing its share capital to NOK 161,243.93 divided into 53,747,977 shares. This move is aimed at enhancing the company’s operations and market positioning by bolstering financial resources to further its mission of combating soil degradation and promoting ecosystem resilience. The registration of new shares is a strategic step likely to impact stakeholders by supporting Desert Control’s continued growth and sustainability initiatives.

More about Desert Control AS

Desert Control AS is a company focused on developing innovative solutions to enhance soil health, conserve water, and promote ecosystem resilience. Their primary product, Liquid Natural Clay (LNC), is designed to transform sandy, fast-draining soils to retain water and nutrients, thereby improving soil health, crop yields, and ecosystem vitality. The company aims to combat desertification, soil degradation, and water scarcity, providing customized solutions to strengthen sustainability, profitability, and prosperity for agriculture, forests, and green landscapes.

YTD Price Performance: 9.05%

Average Trading Volume: 7,282

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €24.9M
